# TruHeirs

> TruHeirs is a premium digital family office platform that helps families build, protect, and pass on wealth across generations through trust creation, governance, education, and coaching.

## Pages

- [Sign In](/auth): Trustee sign-in portal for the TruHeirs platform.
- [Help Center](/help): Frequently asked questions about billing, features, courses, coaching, community, and investments.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with the TruHeirs team for support and partnerships.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy): How TruHeirs collects, protects, and uses personal and financial data.
- [Terms of Service](/terms-of-service): Terms governing use of the TruHeirs platform.
- [Cookie Policy](/cookie-policy): How TruHeirs uses cookies and similar technologies.
